rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous competitive tension with relief points at lap/race completion; tension escalates as opponents adapt strategy

difficulty_curve.early_game: tutorial-style introduction to driving and basic opponent interaction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: increased opponent aggression and tactical complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: multiple skilled opponents, tactical combat racing required

notable_level_patterns.description: Individual race courses where player must outpace and out-maneuver opponents, with Road Rash-inspired combat mechanics allowing direct interaction with rivals
Stylized racing gameplay with humorous, cartoonish physics and competitor interactions rather than realistic simulation

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Street Racer (SNES) article
data_quality_note: T3 tier - limited gameplay documentation available. Sources focus on development history rather than level design specifics. Element introduction order, rhythm, and spatial patterns inferred from genre conventions (Road Rash comparison) rather than explicit design documentation.
